name: Sho
cooked:
Dear fightfer,

Thank you for excellent summary of past incidents and your proposal to address the issue. I do recognize a bunch of projects trying to supplement miners revenue and really hope any them become a serious source of miners’ revenue. In parallel with those out-of-consensus-rule efforts, we should also make efforts to sustain a healthy amount of miner revenue at consensus level.
